verdict_reason: The engineering layer follows Shankara's reading of atha ca as concessive-hypothetical (granting the materialist premise for argument's sake) without conflating it with Ramanuja's stronger collapse-on-itself reading. The verse's three load-bearing terms (nitya-jātam, nainam, arhasi) are preserved in shape: the constancy of the cycle, the specific 'this' (this deprecation) as referent, and the imperative force of arhasi rendered as 'is structurally misplaced.' No tradition is silently mapped onto another. The Kafka-consumer-replaced-Memcached-replaced-in-request-caching lineage is the engineering analog of the materialist's own observation of birth-and-death; this is faithful to Shankara's argumentative shape.
